calculation_convention: Per prior, exact (no premature rounding): nominal_after_fee = (1 + real_geometric_return) * (1 + expected_inflation) * (1 - annual_fee_rate) - 1. If a source already publishes a nominal, after-fee figure, set nominal_after_fee=true and use nominal_after_fee_return verbatim (no further conversion). FX from->base drift = (1 + base_inflation) / (1 + quote_inflation) - 1 (relative PPP; HKD via USD peg). Values are rounded to 4 decimals only when written into the canonical profile.

return_priors.market: China A-shares broad market (CSI 300 total return)
return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: RA 10y expected real geometric return for China equity (4.0%) compounded with CNY long-run inflation (2.0%); index-level, no investor fee.

return_priors.market: Developed ex-China equity (MSCI World), CNY-priced proxy
return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: RA developed-market equity expected real return (4.5%) compounded with CNY long-run inflation (2.0%). Currency view carried separately by the FX factor.

return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: RA China aggregate bond expected real return (1.0%) compounded with CNY long-run inflation (2.0%).

return_priors.market: Developed ex-China aggregate bonds (Bloomberg Global Agg ex-CNY)
return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: RA developed-market aggregate bond expected real return (1.0%) compounded with CNY long-run inflation (2.0%). Currency view carried separately by the FX factor.

return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: RA China cash expected real return (-0.2%) compounded with CNY long-run inflation (2.0%). Cash is deterministic (no volatility band).

return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: Native-currency local return: RA developed equity real return (4.5%) compounded with US long-run inflation (2.0%). USD->CNY conversion handled by the FX factor.

return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: Native-currency local return: RA developed bond real return (1.0%) compounded with US long-run inflation (2.0%). USD->CNY conversion handled by the FX factor.

return_priors.market: Developed ex-China equity, HKD-priced (HKD pegged to USD)
return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: HKD is USD-pegged (LERS), so the local-currency return mirrors the USD developed-equity prior. HKD->CNY conversion handled by the FX factor.

return_priors.market: Developed ex-China aggregate bonds, HKD-priced (HKD pegged to USD)
return_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
return_priors.note: HKD is USD-pegged (LERS), so the local-currency return mirrors the USD developed-bond prior. HKD->CNY conversion handled by the FX factor.

fx_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
fx_priors.note: Long-run USD/CNY drift via relative PPP = (1+CNY inflation)/(1+USD inflation)-1. With equal 2.0% long-run inflation this is 0%. BIS effective-exchange-rate series used to confirm no persistent real-rate trend.

fx_priors.reviewed_by: FIRE 投研团队 (CMA v3 sign-off)
fx_priors.note: HKD is USD-pegged (LERS, 7.75-7.85 band), so HKD/CNY drift and volatility track USD/CNY; drift = (1+CNY inflation)/(1+HKD inflation)-1 = 0%.
